description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure dressed in a short, form-fitting dress with short sleeves and a high collar. She has a cyberpunk-inspired appearance, featuring a mechanical or armored right arm and a visible tattoo sleeve on her left arm. Her legs are covered with semi-transparent stockings, and she wears high-heeled shoes. The figure's hair is styled in a high ponytail with angular, futuristic accessories on her head. She also wears fingerless gloves and has a small pouch or holster attached to her right thigh, suggesting a functional or tactical element to her attire.
description: A stylized adult woman in a short dress with a mechanical arm, tattoo sleeve, high ponytail, and high heels, exuding a cyberpunk aesthetic.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the high ponytail, back of the dress, and the holster on the right thigh.
description_view_1: Left profile highlighting the tattoo sleeve, glove, and the side contour of the dress and shoes.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the mechanical right arm, facial features, high collar, and both gloves.
description_view_3: Right profile emphasizing the mechanical arm, glove, and the side silhouette of the dress and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted short dress with high collar, semi-transparent stockings, fingerless gloves, and a tactical thigh holster
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in a high ponytail with angular accents
